bsc-hons-computing.title: BSc (Hons) Computing
bsc-hons-computing.subtitle: IT & Software Engineering
bsc-hons-computing.description: Transform your passion for technology into a professional career with our world-class computing degree.
bsc-hons-computing.overview: This program provides a comprehensive foundation in modern computing, from software development to artificial intelligence. Students will gain practical skills in coding, systems analysis, and project management while working on real-world projects.

modules.name: Logic and Problem Solving
modules.description: Foundations of computational thinking and algorithms.

modules.name: Fundamentals of Computing
modules.description: Core principles of computer hardware and software.

modules.name: Introduction to Programming
modules.description: Building the base for software development with modern languages.

modules.name: Digital Information Systems
modules.description: Understanding data and how it moves in the digital age.

modules.name: Databases & Web Apps
modules.description: Building and managing data-driven web solutions.

modules.name: Artificial Intelligence
modules.description: Introduction to machine learning and neural networks.

modules.name: Honours Project
modules.description: Deep dive into a specialized topic of your choice.

entryRequirements.academic: Minimum 50% in 10+2 (or equivalent) in any stream. Mathematics background preferred but not mandatory.
entryRequirements.language: Minimum IELTS score of 6.0 (with no band less than 5.5) or equivalent English proficiency test.

learningOutcomes: Analyze and solve complex computational problems using systematic approaches.
Design, implement, and evaluate software systems to meet specified requirements.
Demonstrate proficiency in multiple programming languages and development frameworks.
Understand and apply principles of data security and ethical computing.
Collaborate effectively in professional software development teams.

careerOpportunities.title: Software Engineer
careerOpportunities.description: Design and build complex software systems.

careerOpportunities.title: Data Analyst
careerOpportunities.description: Turn data into actionable business insights.

careerOpportunities.title: UX Designer
careerOpportunities.description: Craft intuitive and beautiful digital experiences.

careerOpportunities.title: AI Developer
careerOpportunities.description: Build the next generation of intelligent systems.

quote.text: You can't learn to swim by reading the book.
quote.author: Albert Einstein

faqs.question: Is the degree globally recognized?
faqs.answer: Yes, our degrees are awarded by London Metropolitan University and are recognized worldwide for their quality and academic rigor.

faqs.question: Are there scholarship opportunities?
faqs.answer: We offer merit-based scholarships for high-achieving students. Please contact our admissions office for specific eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: Do you provide placement assistance?
faqs.answer: Yes, our career services cell works closely with industry partners to provide internship and placement opportunities for all eligible students.

digital-business-management.title: Digital Business Management
digital-business-management.subtitle: Business & Leadership
digital-business-management.description: Master the art of managing businesses in the digital era with a focus on innovation and strategy.
digital-business-management.overview: This program explores the intersection of business management and digital technology. Students learn how to leverage digital tools for marketing, operations, and strategic decision-making in a global context.

modules.name: Business Foundations
modules.description: Understanding the core of modern business.

quote.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
quote.author: Steve Jobs

international-business.title: International Business
international-business.subtitle: Global Commerce
international-business.description: Prepare for a career in the global marketplace with a deep understanding of international trade and culture.
international-business.overview: International Business focuses on the challenges and opportunities of operating across borders. Students study global economics, international law, and cross-cultural management.

quote.text: The world is a book and those who do not travel read only one page.
quote.author: Augustine of Hippo

advertising-marketing.title: Advertising & Marketing
advertising-marketing.subtitle: Creative Media
advertising-marketing.description: Harness your creativity to build powerful brands and connect with audiences worldwide.
advertising-marketing.overview: This course combines creative thinking with strategic marketing. Students learn consumer behavior, digital advertising, and brand management.
